summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shopply Lombardia + Sicilia expansion (33 stores, 6963 products). All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - LocationPicker shows Lombardia and Sicilia sections with preset locations, GPS button with reverse geocoding, search functionality, and coverage message.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/seed: Creates 33 supermarkets and 6963 products
✅ GET /api/supermercati: Returns 33 supermarkets with regione and citta fields
✅ Supermarkets distributed: 21 Lombardia, 12 Sicilia
✅ GET /api/supermercati/nearby (Catania): Returns 7 stores within 10km
✅ GET /api/supermercati/nearby (Gallarate): Returns 9 stores within 10km
✅ GET /api/supermercati/nearby (Palermo): Returns 5 stores within 10km
✅ GET /api/supermercati/nearby (Pioltello): Returns 12 stores within 10km
✅ GET /api/copertura: Returns zones for Lombardia and Sicilia with correct store counts
✅ GET /api/copertura: Zone details verified (Pioltello:8, Gallarate:9, Catania:7, Palermo:5)
✅ GET /api/copertura: Message includes 'Lombardia e Sicilia' and 'Q2 2026'
✅ GET /api/prodotti?search=Pomodoro&supermercato_id=esselunga-gallarate-pegoraro: Returns products
✅ GET /api/prodotti?search=Latte&supermercato_id=conad-catania-umberto: Returns products
✅ GET /api/prodotti?search=Pasta&supermercato_id=deco-catania-galermo: Returns products
✅ New chain Il Gigante exists in Gallarate
✅ New chain Deco exists in Catania and Palermo
✅ New chain Ipercoop exists in Catania and Palermo
✅ GET /api/supermercati/{id}: Returns correct store with regione/citta
✅ GET /api/supermercati/nonexistent: Returns 404
✅ Frontend: LocationPicker shows Lombardia section with 6 presets
✅ Frontend: LocationPicker shows Sicilia section with 4 presets
✅ Frontend: GPS button labeled '📍 Usa posizione attuale'
✅ Frontend: Coverage message 'Copertura Lombardia e Sicilia. Espansione nazionale Q2 2026.'
✅ Frontend: Selecting 'Catania Centro' updates location bar to show Catania coordinates
✅ Frontend: Search 'Gallarate' returns 'Gallarate, Varese, Lombardia' from Nominatim
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Supermercato model was missing regione and citta fields - added Optional[str] fields to include them in API responses
seed_data_creation: Seed creates 33 supermarkets (21 Lombardia, 12 Sicilia) and 6963 products across 12 categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopply v7 expansion fully tested. 33 stores across Lombardia (Pioltello, Segrate, Cernusco, Gallarate) and Sicilia (Catania, Palermo). New chains: Il Gigante (Gallarate), Deco (Catania/Palermo), Ipercoop (Catania/Palermo). /supermercati/nearby endpoint correctly placed before /{id} route. LocationPicker uses Nominatim for geocoding (NOT MOCKED). Regional pricing has ~3% markup for Sicilia.

mocked_apis.Nominatim geocoding: NOT MOCKED - Real API calls to nominatim.openstreetmap.org
mocked_apis.Browser geolocation: Returns server IP location in preview environment (expected)

location_picker.coverage_message: Copertura Lombardia e Sicilia. Espansione nazionale Q2 2026.
